title: biophytum intermedium var. verticillatum
intro: Biophytum intermedium var. verticillatum, also known as 'Sariva' or 'Tulsi with stems', is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Oxalidaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Biophytum intermedium var. verticillatum include relief from fever, cold, cough, and various other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
